{{Quote|As for Vermel himself... I thought we'd lock him up somewhere quiet for the moment.|[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|Tierce]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
'''Rimcee Station''' was an [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] in the [[Rimcee system]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]] it was the location of imprisonment of [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon's]] aide, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Meizh Vermel]], who had been captured by order of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]] in his attempt to foil Pellaeon's [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|peace proposal]].<ref name="VotF" /> In [[44 ABY]], during the [[Lost Tribe of Sith emergence]], the treacherous [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] [[Woolbam]] attempted to [[Attack on Rimcee Station|annex]] Rimcee Station from Moff [[Garreter]], a loyal supporter of [[Head of State (Imperial Remnant)|Head of State]] [[Jagged Fel]].<ref name="Apocalypse" />
